changeSet.author: mini-erp
mini-erp
changeSet.sql: DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname = 'minierp_app') THEN GRANT ALL ON TABLE customers, customer_balances, customer_credits, customer_credit_usages, document_number_sequences, quotes, quote_lines, orders, order_lines, invoices, invoice_lines, credit_notes, deliveries, delivery_lines, payments, payment_allocations TO minierp_app; END IF; END $$;

changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), 'customer:write', 'customer', 'write', 'Create/update/deactivate customers'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'sales:read', 'sales', 'read', 'Read quotes, orders and invoices'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'sales:write', 'sales', 'write', 'Create and manage quotes, orders and invoices'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'delivery:write', 'delivery', 'write', 'Create and manage deliveries'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'payment:write', 'payment', 'write', 'Record and confirm payments') ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uk_permissions_code DO NOTHING;
